metadata.file_name: Bonnie Tyler - Holding Out for a Hero (Club Mix).flac
metadata.title: Holding Out for a Hero (Club Mix)
metadata.album: Club Epic - A Collection Of Classic Dance Mixes: Volume 4
metadata.lyrics:
[00:39.65] Where have all the good men gone and where are all the Gods?
[00:45.41] Where's the street wise Hercules to fight the rising odds?
[00:52.25] Isn't there a white knight upon a fiery steed?
[00:59.18] Late at night I toss and I turn and I dream of what I need
[01:04.24] I need a hero
[01:07.27] I'm holding out for a hero 'til the end of the night
[01:11.25] He's gotta be strong and he's gotta be fast
[01:14.40] And he's gotta be fresh from the fight
[01:17.52] I need a hero
[01:20.16] I'm holding out for a hero 'til the morning light
[01:24.17] He's gotta be sure and it's gotta be soon
[01:27.65] And he's gotta be larger than life, larger than life
[01:44.76] Somewhere after midnight in my wildest fantasy
[01:49.90] Somewhere just beyond my reach there's someone reaching back for me
[01:56.27] Racing on the thunder and rising with the heat
[02:03.93] It's gonna take a Superman to sweep me off my feet
[02:11.50] I need a hero
[02:14.37] I'm holding out for a hero 'til the end of the night
[02:17.85] He's gotta be strong and he's gotta be fast
[02:21.22] And he's gotta be fresh from the fight
[02:24.20] I need a hero
[02:27.05] I'm holding out for a hero 'til the morning light
[02:30.81] He's gotta be sure and it's gotta be soon
[02:34.57] And he's gotta be larger than life
[02:38.81] I need a hero
[02:41.47] I'm holding out for a hero 'til the end of the night
[03:32.18] Up where the mountains meet the heavens above
[03:35.09] Out where the lightning splits the sea
[03:38.07] I could swear that there's someone somewhere watching me
[03:44.50] Through the wind and the chill and the rain
[03:48.23] And the storm and the flood
[03:51.11] I can feel his approach like a fire in my blood
[04:04.91] I need a hero
[04:07.48] I'm holding out for a hero 'til the end of the night
[04:11.40] He's gotta be strong and he's gotta be fast
[04:15.85] And he's gotta be fresh from the fight
[04:17.86] I need a hero
[04:20.16] I'm holding out for a hero 'til the morning light
[04:24.16] He's gotta be sure and it's gotta be soon
[04:27.78] And he's gotta be larger than life
[04:30.72] I need a hero
[04:34.63] I'm holding out for a hero 'til the end of the night
[04:36.84] He's gotta be strong and he's gotta be fast
[04:42.88] And he's gotta be fresh from the fight
[04:44.03] I need a hero
[04:46.50] I'm holding out for a hero 'til the morning light
[04:50.62] He's gotta be sure and it's gotta be soon
[04:54.33] And he's gotta be larger than life
[04:56.58] I need a hero
[05:00.07] I'm holding out for a hero 'til the end of the night
[05:02.86]
